plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-202 RP06.P02.M03.S01-RP06.P02.M04.S15 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-202 implements descriptor-only DMS primary/secondary workflow route matrix evidence: service entrypoint contract continuation, request normalization, tenant/matter/permission/audit prechecks, happy/denied/review/approval/blocked routes, state transition/idempotency/lock/persistence descriptors, rollback/retry descriptors, workflow case set, Hermes/Claude packets, contract snapshot, focused tests, and CP00-203 handoff.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-202 dms core primary secondary workflow descriptor pack
